assignments.title: Essay 1: Causes of World War I
assignments.description: Write a 1,000-word essay analysing the main causes of WWI. Cite at least three sources.

assignments.title: Problem Set 3: Recursion
assignments.description: Solve problems 1–8. Submit a link to your repository or paste your code.

assignments.title: Reading Response: Chapter 4
assignments.description: A short reflection on the assigned reading.

submissions.content: I found the chapter on supply and demand particularly insightful because...
submissions.feedback: Great reflection — well argued. Watch your conclusion length.
